tasks.title: Fix API integration issues (405/500 errors)
tasks.description: Check all frontend API calls match backend endpoints. Verify HTTP methods (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) and paths. Test each endpoint with curl from inside the container. Fix any mismatches. Common issues: frontend calls /api/rules but backend expects /api/rules/ (trailing slash), or frontend uses GET but backend expects POST.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: All API endpoints return correct responses (200/201/204) when called with correct auth token. pnpm build passes.

tasks.title: Write comprehensive E2E tests for all pages
tasks.description: Delete all existing E2E test files. Write new tests from scratch based on what the Stitch design shows. Each page must have tests for: 1) page renders with correct layout 2) key elements visible (stat cards, tables, charts, buttons) 3) navigation works via sidebar 4) modals open/close 5) forms accept input. Mock ALL API responses with page.route(). Tests must verify the Stitch design is implemented: Material Symbols icons, dark theme, correct accent color, rounded-xl cards, uppercase tracking-widest labels. At least 20 tests total.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: npx playwright test --reporter=line passes with 0 failures and 20+ tests.

tasks.title: Final review
tasks.description: Review all changes. Verify E2E passes. Verify pnpm build. Fix any issues.
